testcase.name: getRoot_ShouldBePublicAndReturnSuccess
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: getSecure_WithoutToken_ShouldReturn401Unauthorized
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29 22:36:03.255 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Securing GET /secure 2026-06-29 22:36:03.255 [main] DEBUG o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter - Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2026-06-29 22:36:03.256 [main] ERROR c.c.o.config.ResourceServerConfig - Authentication failed for request to /secure: Full authentication is required to access this resource

testcase.name: getProfile_WithValidToken_ShouldReturnUserProfile
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29 22:36:03.283 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Securing GET /profile 2026-06-29 22:36:03.284 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Secured GET /profile 2026-06-29 22:36:03.286 [main] INFO c.c.o.controller.SecureController - Authorized access: retrieving profile for user (subject: john.doe@cognizant.com) 2026-06-29 22:36:03.286 [main] DEBUG c.c.o.controller.SecureController - Successfully extracted JWT claims: {sub=john.doe@cognizant.com, scope=read write, company=Cognizant}

testcase.name: getSecure_WithValidToken_ShouldReturn200Ok
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29 22:36:03.293 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Securing GET /secure 2026-06-29 22:36:03.293 [main] DEBUG o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy - Secured GET /secure 2026-06-29 22:36:03.293 [main] INFO c.c.o.controller.SecureController - Authorized access: executing secure endpoint.
